title: OC2R: Create
description: A bridge addon between OpenComputers 2: Reimagined and Create!
body:
**OC2R: Create** is a bridge/integration addon between **OpenComputers 2: Reimagined** and **Create**!
  
This is accomplished by mimicking Create's existing CC: Tweaked peripherals using OC2R's Device system as well as adding some new ones of our own.

*Note: If you are on 0.5.1j without the [Post Production Backport](<https://modrinth.com/mod/post-production-backported>) mod, most of these devices will not be available!*
